About Me

Zero Errors.
100% Happy.

With nearly 6 years of progressive HR experience, I specialise in Talent Acquisition, HR Operations, Compensation & Benefits, Payroll, and Employee Relations. My approach is grounded in data-driven decision-making.

I am deeply committed to actively enhancing employee benefits programmes, ensuring error-free C&B delivery, and achieving 100% employee satisfaction by consistently delivering on every commitment.

At Link3 Technologies Ltd., I lead workforce planning, organogram redesign, policy development, and HR automation initiatives that drive real organisational growth.

Work Experience

Career Timeline

Progressive HR leadership across technology companies in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

Jul 2024 — Present
Current Role · Promoted from Senior Executive
Assistant Manager, Human Resources
Link3 Technologies Ltd. · Dhaka, Bangladesh
  • Owned full Compensation & Benefits portfolio: payroll processing (salary, allowances, variable pay), group insurance renegotiation, and benefits benchmarking — achieving 100% accuracy and 10% premium cost reduction.
  • Designed and maintained the Tier-1 Business Steering Review Dashboard and workforce MIS reports, providing senior leadership with real-time visibility into KPIs and SLA compliance.
  • Coordinate the rollout of the Quarterly KPI-Based Performance & Incentive System, supporting KPI communication, tracker management, stakeholder coordination, performance data consolidation, and reporting across departments.
  • Partnered with C-suite and department heads on workforce planning, org structure realignment, and talent strategy — directly improving span of control and eliminating redundant role overlaps across business units.
  • Led end-to-end recruitment from job profiling to offer management and directed organogram redesign across all departments — reducing hiring cycle time and improving workforce efficiency.
  • Ensured 100% HR operation compliance under the Bangladesh Labor Act 2006 across all employment practices, confirmations, probation tracking, onboarding, and offboarding with zero audit findings.
Oct 2021 — Jun 2024
Senior Executive, Human Resources
Link3 Technologies Ltd. · Dhaka, Bangladesh
  • Eliminated recurring payroll errors through dual-review controls and automated validation — foundation of the 100% accuracy record sustained through promotion.
  • Built foundational HR analytics frameworks and MIS dashboards, enabling data-driven leadership reporting on workforce trends, attrition, and operational KPIs.
  • Supported full-cycle recruitment, competency-based job design, and optimized the final settlement and exit process — achieving full documentation compliance and reduced turnaround.
  • Administered HRIS to maintain accurate employee records across the complete employee lifecycle from onboarding to separation.
Sep 2018 — Aug 2019
Executive, Human Resources
Disrupt Technologies Ltd. · Dhaka, Bangladesh
  • Managed full-cycle recruitment including sourcing, screening, structured interviewing, offer negotiation, and onboarding for multiple roles.
  • Collaborated with hiring managers to map competency profiles and ensure effective candidate-to-role matching.
  • Enhanced the onboarding program to improve new hire integration, engagement, and early retention outcomes.
  • Maintained structured recruitment databases and documentation ensuring audit-ready records and consistent candidate tracking.

Impact & Results

Key Achievements

Measurable outcomes delivered across HR operations, talent management, and employee experience at Link3 Technologies Ltd.

# 🔶 Challenge 🔵 Solution 🟢 Result
1 High payroll errors causing employee dissatisfaction and delayed salary disbursement Implemented systematic process controls, automated validation checks, and introduced a dual-review system Achieved 100% error-free payroll delivery for 6 consecutive cycles
2 Low employee satisfaction with existing benefits and insurance programs Renegotiated insurance terms, added new benefits, and improved the claims process end-to-end 100% employee satisfaction achieved + optimized premium costs
3 Executive management lacked a centralised, real-time view of Tier-1 operational performance, SLA adherence, submission compliance, business risks, and departmental KPI status. Reporting was fragmented across multiple files, making reviews time-consuming and limiting visibility into critical issues. Designed and developed an interactive Tier-1 Business Review Dashboard consolidating cross-functional KPIs, submission tracking, SLA performance, risk indicators, escalation monitoring, and executive action items into a single management reporting platform — enabling leadership to instantly identify performance gaps and priority actions. Centralised performance monitoring reduced review preparation time, increased operational visibility, and enabled proactive escalation management across departments
4 Final settlement process was slow and error-prone, causing employee complaints Redesigned workflow, created standardised checklists, and automated settlement calculations Reduced turnaround time by 40% + zero complaints received
5 KPI-Based Performance & Incentive Rollout: Coordinated the rollout of the Quarterly KPI-Based Performance & Incentive System, supporting KPI communication, tracker management, stakeholder coordination, performance data consolidation, and reporting. Established a structured quarterly cadence for KPI communication, built and maintained trackers, coordinated with department stakeholders, and consolidated performance data for leadership reporting. Enabled consistent, transparent quarterly performance and incentive reporting across departments
